text: FBI 302: Maxwell assaulted 16-year-old during massage at ranch while Epstein watched (Spring 1996)
Witness observed Maxwell recruiting young blonde girl over tea: "perfect to introduce to JE"
FBI 302: Epstein flew 16-yr-old to Zorro Ranch; Maxwell assaulted her during massage, Epstein entered her bedroom.
Witness observed Maxwell recruiting a young blonde girl over tea, saying she would be "perfect to introduce to JE."
Maxwell arraigned July 14, 2020 in Case 20 Cr. 330; victim testifies Maxwell has international connections and is a flight risk.
